name: Tailscale Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active Tailscale accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_seen AS last_login FROM tailscale_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (u.last_seen IS NULL OR u.last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
